Api._comment: Base URL of the Lumen API. Override via dotnet user-secrets (dev) or env var Api__BaseUrl (prod). No trailing slash.

SqlServer._comment: Set real connection string via dotnet user-secrets (dev) or env var SqlServer__ConnectionString (prod). NEVER commit real values.

Redis._comment: Redis is required for the permission cache (IUserPermissionCache). Run via docker-compose (see docker-compose.yml — service 'redis', port 6379). Set ConnectionString via dotnet user-secrets (dev) or env var Redis__ConnectionString (prod). NEVER commit real values.

Dashboard._comment: Set real credentials via dotnet user-secrets (dev) or env vars (prod). NEVER commit real values. Empty values deny access (fail-closed).
